name: @elvis1513/auto-coding-skill
description: CLI installer for a delivery-first .agents workflow with adaptive Git isolation, routed changed-scope validation, risk-based review, push completion, and safe cleanup.

scripts.test: node -c cli/src/index.js && node -c cli/src/sync-assets.js && node -c cli/tests/index.test.js && node cli/tests/index.test.js && python3 -c "import ast, pathlib; files = ['cli/assets/skill/scripts/ap.py', 'cli/assets/skill/scripts/core.py', 'cli/assets/skill/scripts/http_checks.py', 'cli/assets/skill/scripts/install_integrity.py', 'cli/assets/skill/scripts/scaffold_templates.py']; [ast.parse(pathlib.Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8'), filename=rel, feature_version=(3, 11)) for rel in files]; print('python311-asset-grammar-ok')" && python3 -m py_compile cli/assets/skill/scripts/ap.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/core.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/http_checks.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/install_integrity.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/scaffold_templates.py && python3 cli/tests/core_shell_test.py && python3 cli/tests/ap_profiles_test.py && python3 cli/tests/ap_concurrency_test.py && python3 -c "import pathlib, tomllib; files = sorted(pathlib.Path('cli/assets/agents').glob('*.toml')); [tomllib.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) for path in files]; print('asset-agent-toml-ok')" && find cli -type d -name '__pycache__' -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.test:src: python3 -c "import ast, pathlib; files = ['src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/ap.py', 'src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/core.py', 'src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/http_checks.py', 'src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/install_integrity.py', 'src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/scaffold_templates.py']; [ast.parse(pathlib.Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8'), filename=rel, feature_version=(3, 11)) for rel in files]; print('python311-src-grammar-ok')" && python3 -m py_compile src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/ap.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/core.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/http_checks.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/install_integrity.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/scaffold_templates.py && python3 -c "import pathlib, tomllib; files = sorted(pathlib.Path('src/agents').glob('*.toml')); [tomllib.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) for path in files]; print('src-agent-toml-ok')" && find src -type d -name '__pycache__' -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.release:check: npm run check:assets && npm run test:src && npm run test && npm run check:package
